string 2: *sigh*
I bet my dad and Hiroko are so worried...
Knowing your father, he's raising hell.{next}
Didn't you leave a note or anything?
Every child needs to leave the nest one day...

Right? One time, I didn't come straight home from school
and my dad ended up searching all over town for me.
I didn't have a chance to.
I never imagined anything like this would happen.
No, my dad doesn't think that way. He'll definitely lose his mind.

I mean, can we blame him? After all, he lost two of his
family members three years ago, too...
But, yeah, he's still way too overprotective.
And what about your friend Hiroko?

Yeah, I bet she's worried to pieces. We've been best
friends since we were little kids.

You know that video streaming thing she does? I think she
does that for me.

She says she's doing it to get rich, but that's not true.
She always used to say she wanted to make anime...

I don't think she was ever into the supernatural or urban
legends. At least, not until I lost my my mom and brother.
She's doing all that for you?{next}
Is she gathering information about the accident?{next}
So she lied about doing it for the money?{next}

Yeah, I think so. She's trying to find even the smallest
clue about the accident.
She should just say so, then.

She's just worried I'd feel guilty about it. That's why she
says it's for the money.
Hiroko is really kind at heart like that.
I still don't really get it.
You will in time. After all, you're basically still a newborn.
Is that the Gear Forest?
Wait! Those things... Are they...?!

Digimon are flying in the same direction as us... toward
the Gear Forest!

I haven't seen a forest like this since I went camping in
elementary school... No, this place is even more amazing!
The Digimon we saw earlier flew this way, too.
If they're Titans...
Yeah. Let's go. I just hope the fighting hasn't started yet!
What was that sound just now? Was it the Titans?

If it was, then we'd really better hurry! Come on! Inori,
stay behind me!
Hm? What is it?

It's like... you're getting to be more and more like a real
hero. I feel better just knowing you're here...
Is that supposed to be a compliment?
Of course! But...
...at the same time, it also feels like we're growing farther apart.
Inori...
I—
Hey! Stop that!
They're obviously bullying the weak! We can't ignore that!
Thank you for saving me! They attacked so suddenly from above.

They caught me off guard. I really would've been in trouble
if you folks didn't come along!
I'm glad you're safe. Are you a Digimon of the Gear Forest?
Yes! I'm Palmon. Nice to meet you!
So the Titans are all over this area, huh?
Yes, that's right! I have to warn everyone!

We'll come with you. Junomon sent us here to protect this
place.
Are you worried about Aegiomon?{next}
Do you think Aegiomon will stay in this world?{next}
I wonder what Aegiomon wants to do after this...{next}
Honestly...

...I've been thinking how awesome it'd be if the three of
us could stick together forever.
Of course that means you, too, {player}!

I first met Aegiomon in the Shinjuku underground, and then
you came along and rescued us, {player}.
You really are a nice person, you know that?
My life was never the same after that.
You don't know what I was like before I met you two...

All I ever did was cry about the past, walling myself away
and praying for the world to give my mom and Yuu back.

It's weird, but since I met all of you... I don't pray like that
anymore.
Now I can... I can move forward.

Still... it was selfish of me to hope this could continue on
forever like this, huh?
I know how it feels to lose family members...{next}
Your story feels oddly familiar...{next}
I wish the three of us could be like a family...{next}
Well, thanks for hearing me out... I mean it.
I've never even opened up like this to Hiroko...
Okay, I've made my decision! I'm going to be supportive.

I don't care what path Aegiomon takes! I have to repay him
for everything he's done for me!
Welcome to our village! Make yourselves at home!
It's wonderful. Almost like a fantasy!

Hee hee! I'm glad you like it! ...Oh, I need to tell everyone
about the Titans!

I'll make sure everyone around here hears. Could you go
and tell Bacchusmon about it?
Bacchusmon?
The chief of this village! ...Sort of?

He's drunk most of the time, so Sirenmon ends up doing the
actual work.
Got it. We'll be sure to tell Bacchusmon.
Thank you! I'll see you folks later.
The World Tree, huh?

It's a frequent theme of myths and legends in the human
world, too.

It wouldn't be a stretch to call our various mythologies the
greatest anomalies in human history.

I'm intrigued, but that's something we can look into later.
There will be plenty of time after saving the world...
Aaah!
Ugh... What's that smell?
Um... Excuse me. Who might you be?
That drunk Digimon you see there is Bacchusmon.

He's... the Chief of this village, I guess. And my name is
Sirenmon.

I suppose you could call me the "partner" of that drunk—I mean, 
the chief.

We've had a long and... one could say "inseparable"
relationship.

So you're the drunk— I mean, Bacchusmon? There's
something we need to tell you.
*hiccup*
Please, go on.
Yes. Junomon asked us to come here.

The World Tree is going to be targeted. We even ran into
Titans on the way here!
*hiccup*
Can you hear me?{next}
You've had way too much to drink...{next}
Cheers it is, I guess!{next}
Ungh...
I'll respond for that drunkard over there.

It is Bacchusmon's responsibility to guard the World Tree
and defend it from the Titans, to the death if necessary.
Is Bacchusmon even listening?

But we obviously can't rely on an alcoholic in this
situation, so I will go and fulfill that duty instead.
Is that all right with you, Bacchusmon?
*hiccup*
If you're Junomon's envoys, that means you can fight, too, right?

I'd like some help, if you can. Will you come with me to
the World Tree?
Of course! That's the whole reason we're here. After all, I'm...
Uh, never mind.

All right. Let's go see what's going on. We'll listen to the
whisperings and songs of the World Tree.
There's the World Tree—
Everyone! There! Titans at the World Tree!
Those damn Titans...!
Are they... sucking out its sap?

What kind of a monster would target the World Tree?! Do
the Titans not care about the end of the Digital World?!
Get back, Inori!
Thank goodness...! Is the World Tree safe...?
Sirenmon. What's wrong?
I can't hear the World Tree's voice... I can't sense its power.
Even though we drove those Titans away...
Did the Titans suck all the power out?
All of it? But that's not possible! How could it be?!
The World Tree...!
Hey! *hiccup* What's going on here?
Bacchusmon. Are you... okay?

Well, it's an emergency, isn't it? You expect me to sit
around drunk at a time like this?! *hiccup*
Is... standing around drunk any better?
Shhh!

*hiccup* How impudent of those Titans! They altered the
flow of the Current, didn't they!

The Current is the path along which the energy emitted by
the World Tree is delivered throughout the Digital World.

I don't know how they did it, but they disrupted the entire
Current! *hiccup*

One thing I do know... It seems they mixed in some strange
substance...
I see. So, earlier, they weren't extracting anything...
...but, rather, injecting it with something instead.

Whatever the case, this is bad... The loss of the Current
will cause a ton of chaos throughout the Digital World.
Let's reassess the situation back at the village.
Aaaaah!

Wait, didn't you JUST say it was no time to be sitting
around drunk?
*hiccup*
Please forgive Bacchusmon. He wasn't always like this...

It seems the drinking started when the pressure of
protecting the World Tree became too much.
Now, the drinking never stops.

The pressure just goes to show how important the World
Tree is. In the human world, it would be like...
Electricity?{next}
Fuel? {next}
A water supply?{next}
I wouldn't want to imagine a world without that.
Hey, Sirenmon.

Gather all the able-bodied young folk in the village. We're
going into high alert mode.
Are you all right?
I'm sober. Totally sober now...

You folk. I've got a small favor to ask. A message for
Junomon.

The World Tree has been attacked. An all-out war is
inevitable.

It's a shame, but the days of peace are over. Unless we
meet this attack with everything we have... we'll lose.
War...?

Got it. We'll relay the message to Junomon as soon as
possible.
Next time you're around, drinks are on me. I'm counting on you.

This "Current" must be the energy source of the Digital
World. Conflicts only escalate if such things get destroyed.

That's basically what happened here after the Shinjuku
Inferno. So... there's another strange parallel.

Perhaps... this was a war that spanned eight years. One that
spread from their world to ours... and led to its demise.

There have to be some clues to getting to the truth
of things there. Keep on digging, Agent {player}.
Hey, you guys!
Are you here to see us off?
No, that's not it. We've got trouble!

We just got word at the village. The Titans are attacking
Junomon's temple in great numbers!
The Titans are doing what?!
That's terrible! Let's hurry back to the Guardian Palace!
